name: Crunchy Chocolate Chipsters
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease baking sheet with Golden Crisco Shortening. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Golden Crisco Shortening, Granulated sugar, and Brown sugar until well blended. Add Milk and mix in. Beat in Egg and Vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, Baking soda, and Salt. Gradually add this mixture to the creamed mixture, stirring until just combined. Stir in the Crisp rice cereal and chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (about 30 mL) of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches (5 cm) apart.
5. Bake for 9 minutes. Remove from oven and transfer to a cooling rack.
Hint: Experiment with different cookie or crispy cereal varieties instead of miniature chips. Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
